name: ext-mcp-trust
description: Pure trust framework helpers for signed trust bundles, trust lock loading, and governed authorization_server selection.
docs:
MCP trust framework helpers.

Modules:
- std.mcp.trust.bundle_v1
- std.mcp.trust.framework_v1
- std.mcp.trust.resolve_v1
- std.mcp.trust.fingerprint_v1
- std.mcp.trust.errors_v1
- std.mcp.trust.bundle_sig_stmt_v1
- std.mcp.trust.bundle_sig_verify_v1
- std.mcp.trust.bundle_lock_v1
- std.mcp.trust.as_select_v1
